title: [FIRRTL] Incorrect behavior for size == 1 CHIRRTL smems with write first read-under-write behavior
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is a FIRRTL/CHIRRTL compiler bug in CIRCT where the tool incorrectly generates Verilog output with extra latency for size==1 smems. The issue contains no SV code blocks; the Verilog snippets shown are tool-generated output, not bug-triggering input constructs. The bug is in the compilation/optimization logic, not in SV language constructs.
